summary: A website for a basketball team called 'The Blue Panthers' where people can sign up to join or follow the team.

existing_features.title: Build a homepage for the Blue Panthers basketball team featuring the team name, a short tagline, key team information section, and a clear call-to-action button to join/sign up.

Build a sign-up form page where visitors can register their name, email address, and select a role (Player, Fan, or Supporter) to join the Blue Panthers community. On submission, call the backend registration function and display a success or error message.

Apply a bold, energetic visual theme throughout the site using deep navy blue and gold/amber as primary team colors, with strong typography, dynamic layout, and basketball-inspired design elements. Enforce the theme consistently across all pages.

Create an Admin page (route: /admin) that fetches all registered members from the backend using the existing useGetAllMembers query hook and displays them in a styled table showing each member's name, email, role, and sign-up timestamp. Apply the Blue Panthers navy/gold visual theme consistently with the rest of the site.
Add an 'Admin' navigation link in the shared Layout navigation bar (desktop and mobile menus) that routes to /admin.
Register the /admin route in the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx so the Admin page is reachable.

new_feature_requests.summary: User sign-up/registration functionality for team members or fans
Team homepage showcasing the Blue Panthers brand and info

Create a backend actor that stores team member sign-ups with fields: name, email, role (player/fan/supporter), and sign-up timestamp. Expose functions to register a new member and retrieve all members.
Add an admin page that lists all registered members (name, email, role, sign-up timestamp) who have signed up for the team.
